{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Gold District
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Gold District]] is a section of [[Elysia]] where buildings are made of gold and gold-colored stone.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c13">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Armies of white and gold march from the [[Gold District]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c24">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
